\begin{equation}\label{eq:window6_pushforward_markov_kernel}
\begin{aligned}
\pi_6(w)&:=\frac{d^{\mathrm{bin}}_6(w)}{64},\\
\displaystyle P_6(w,w')&:=\frac{A_6(w,w')}{6\,d^{\mathrm{bin}}_6(w)},\\
\pi_6(w)P_6(w,w')&=\pi_6(w')P_6(w',w)=\frac{A_6(w,w')}{64\cdot 6}.
\end{aligned}
\end{equation}
